auth.continueProgress: Sign in to continue your progress
auth.failedGoogle: Failed to log in with Google

library.title: Exercise Library
library.addFirst: Add your first exercise from YouTube!

stats.title: Progress
stats.noLogs: No workouts logged yet. Go train!

ppl.title: Push / Pull / Legs (3-6 Days)
ppl.desc: Best for intermediate/advanced. Rotates muscle groups to allow max recovery.

upperLower.title: Upper / Lower (4 Days)
upperLower.desc: Great balance of volume and recovery.

fullBody.title: Full Body (3 Days)
fullBody.desc: Ideal for beginners or busy schedules.
fullBody.schedule: Mon/Wed/Fri: Hit every muscle group each session (1 exercise per part).

supersets.name: Supersets
supersets.desc: Two exercises performed back-to-back with no rest. (e.g., Bench Press directly into Push-ups).

dropsets.name: Drop Sets
dropsets.desc: Perform a set to failure, then immediately lower the weight and continue to failure again.

pyramid.name: Pyramid
pyramid.desc: Start light/high reps, increase weight/lower reps each set, then reverse.

tut.name: Time Under Tension (TUT)
tut.desc: Slowing down the rep (e.g., 3s down, 1s up) to increase muscle work without heavy weight.

progressive.title: Progressive Overload
progressive.desc: To grow, you must challenge your muscles. Add weight, reps, or better form every week.

recovery.title: Recovery
recovery.desc: Muscles grow while you sleep, not while you train. Aim for 7-9 hours of sleep and eat enough protein (1.6g-2.2g per kg of bodyweight).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and share your information when you use our application.

account.title: Account Information
account.desc: Name, email address, and profile picture (if provided).

usage.title: Usage Data
usage.desc: Workout logs, exercises created, and app preferences.

device.title: Device Data
device.desc: Model, OS version, and other technical details to improve app performance.

items.track: Track your workout progress and generate statistics.
items.improve: Improve our services and develop new features.
items.respond: Respond to your comments and support requests.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at gymcontrolinfo@gmail.com.

deletion.title: Account & Data Deletion
deletion.content: You have the right to request the complete deletion of your account OR specific data (such as workout history, profile images) without deleting your account. To do so, please send an email to gymcontrolinfo@gmail.com with the subject 'Data Deletion Request'. Specify which data you wish to remove. We will process your request within 30 days and the data will be permanently wiped from our servers.

privacy.disclaimer: This is a generic privacy policy template. Please consult with a legal professional to ensure compliance with local laws and regulations.
